notes: TheAgentCompany. Agentic success on real workplace tasks is a near-necessary precursor capability for job automation. Not direct: a score is 'can do the task', not 'a job was lost'.
TheAgentCompany. Role-like task suites across functions => capability proxy for human substitution.
TheAgentCompany. Capability->jobs-impact link is confounded (adoption, augmentation vs substitution, regulation). Weak-proxy only.
WorkArena. Enterprise knowledge-work task completion = automation-capability proxy.
OSWorld. Open-ended computer-use across real apps = broad digital-work automation proxy.
tau-bench. Customer-service workflow completion = concrete service-job automation proxy.
SWE-bench. Resolving real GitHub issues substitutes software-engineering labour on verifiable tasks.
SWE-bench. Resolution rate is a weak downstream proxy for dev-labour displacement (confounded by augmentation).
MLE-bench. End-to-end ML engineering automation proxy.
Agents' Last Exam. Long-horizon professional workflows w/ verifiable outcomes across industries = automation-capability proxy.
